title: Review findings sidecar (extended)
description: Per-PR prior-review record at instance/.review-findings/{owner}_{repo}_{pr}.json. Extends the existing sidecar written by _write_review_findings_sidecar. Reader is fail-open: a missing, corrupt, or legacy (no schema_version) file is treated as 'no prior review' (FR-007).

schema_version.description: Migration guard. Absent => legacy sidecar (pre-feature): read head_sha + file_comments only, ignore new fields.

head_sha.description: PR head SHA reviewed (existing field). Part of the reuse key (FR-001).

base_sha.description: NEW. Base/merge-base SHA at review time. Part of the reuse key: base movement forces re-derive (FR-001, D2).

file_comments.description: Surfaced findings (existing). Each element conforms to review_schema FILE_COMMENTS_SCHEMA plus derived fields below.

title.description: May carry a [Pre-Existing Issue] or [Deferred] prefix (FR-027/FR-034).

identity_key.description: NEW (derived). file + tolerant region + semantic topic (FR-002, D1).

review_summary.description: Existing: summary text, lgtm verdict, checklist.

dispositions.description: NEW. Sticky human dispositions of findings (FR-031-038, D7). Persisted so a dismissed/deferred finding stays dispositioned across rounds until retracted (FR-037).

rationale_quote.description: Quoted/linked comment text. Mandatory for attribution (FR-036).
